Key.English: Enables CQB persistence (requires ALiVE Data Module)
Key.Chinesesimp: 启用CQB持久性(需要ALiVE数据模块)

Key.English: Number of units per CQB group. Actual count is randomised between 1 and this value each time a group spawns.

Pick one or more factions for CQB to spawn. Only applies when Placement is set to Static; has no effect when set to Dominant. Left-click to select one item; Ctrl+Left-click to toggle; Shift+Left-click to range-select. List is auto-populated from loaded faction mods. Combined with the manual override field below at runtime.
Key.Chinesesimp: 选择CQB单位的派系。仅在"布置"设置为静态时适用。
Key.Chinese: 選擇CQB單位的派系。僅在「佈置」設定為靜態時適用。
Key.Spanish: Seleccione una o más facciones para CQB. Solo se aplica cuando el despliegue está en Estático.
Key.French: Sélectionnez une ou plusieurs factions pour le CQB. S'applique uniquement lorsque le déploiement est défini sur Statique.
Key.Portuguese: Selecione uma ou mais facções para o CQB. Aplica-se apenas quando o Posicionamento está definido como Estático.
Key.Russian: Выберите одну или несколько фракций для CQB. Применяется только когда размещение установлено на Статическое.

Key.English: Optional. Type extra faction classnames for mods not currently loaded but expected at mission time. Format: comma-separated classnames with no spaces or quotes — e.g. OPF_F,rhs_faction_msv. Combined with the Factions multi-select above at runtime.
Key.Chinesesimp: 可选。输入当前未加载的模组派系类名，格式：逗号分隔，无空格，无引号。
Key.Chinese: 可選。輸入目前未載入的模組派系類名，格式：逗號分隔，無空格，無引號。
Key.Spanish: Opcional. Escriba classnames de facciones adicionales para mods no cargados actualmente. Formato: nombres separados por comas, sin espacios ni comillas.
Key.French: Facultatif. Saisissez les classnames de factions supplémentaires pour les mods non chargés actuellement. Format : noms séparés par des virgules, sans espaces ni guillemets.
Key.Portuguese: Opcional. Digite classnames de facções adicionais para mods não carregados atualmente. Formato: nomes separados por vírgulas, sem espaços ou aspas.
Key.Russian: Необязательно. Введите classnames дополнительных фракций для незагруженных модов. Формат: имена через запятую, без пробелов и кавычек.

Key.English: Chooses the type of buildings in which CQB will be present
Key.Chinesesimp: 选择CQB将出现的建筑类型

Key.English: Probability in % that a house will be occupied
Only one CQB module can be used
Place the CQB module and select the preferred intensity. Optionally, CQB can be synced to a Mil/Civ Placement module.
Key.Chinesesimp: 放置CQB模块并选择首选强度。或者,CQB可以同步到Mil/Civ Placement模块。

Key.English: Selects the type of area in which CQB will be available. If synced to a Mil/Civ Placement module this setting will be overwritten
Key.Chinesesimp: 选择CQB可用的区域类型。如果同步到Mil/Civ Placement模块,此设置将被覆盖

Key.English: Excludes buildings inside this marker (or markers) from CQB. Enter marker names separated by commas, no spaces, no quotes — e.g. marker1,marker2. Leave blank for no exclusions.

Restricts CQB to buildings inside this marker (or markers). Enter marker names separated by commas, no spaces, no quotes — e.g. marker1,marker2. Leave blank for no restriction. Overridden if this module is synced to a Placement module.
CQB will determine the dominant faction or use static factions from the faction param fields
Key.Chinesesimp: CQB将确定主导势力或使用势力参数字段中的静态势力

Key.English: Density of additional CQB placement. Adds more house locations with a minimum distance of x metres to each other, resulting in a tight grid of CQB positions.
Percentage chance units might patrol around their spawn point.
Key.Chinesesimp: 单位可能在刷新点附近巡逻

Key.English: Percentage chance units will search nearby houses at a patrol waypoint.
Key.Chinesesimp: 单位在巡逻航路点搜索附近房屋的几率

Key.English: Minimum time in seconds the group waits at each patrol waypoint.
Median time in seconds the group waits at each patrol waypoint.
Maximum time in seconds the group waits at each patrol waypoint.
If group is patrolling, then the patrol radius will be no smaller than this value. The radius will be randomly calculated for each group between minimum and maximum patrol radius.
Key.Chinesesimp: 如果小组正在巡逻,则巡逻半径将不小于此值.每组的半径将在最小和最大巡逻半径之间随机计算.

Key.English: If group is patrolling, then the group radius will be no bigger than this value. The radius will be randomly calculated for each group between minimum and maximum patrol radius.
Key.Chinesesimp: 如果小组正在巡逻,则巡逻半径将不大于此值.每组的半径将在最小和最大巡逻半径之间随机计算.

Key.English: Distance in metres at which ground units spawn/despawn around the player. Note: strategic placements use 1.4x this value.
Distance in metres at which static weapons spawn/despawn around the player. Note: strategic placements use 1.4x this value.
Distance in metres at which helicopters spawn/despawn around the player. Set to 0 to disable helicopter spawning. Note: strategic placements use 1.4x this value.
Distance in metres at which fixed-wing aircraft spawn/despawn around the player. Set to 0 to disable jet spawning. Note: strategic placements use 1.4x this value.
Density of static weapon emplacements in CQB areas, such as mortars and machine guns
Key.Chinesesimp: CQB区域的静态武器安放密度,如迫击炮和机枪

Key.English: Classnames of static weapons eligible to spawn in CQB areas. Separate multiple classnames with commas, no spaces, no quotes — e.g. B_HMG_01_high_F,O_Mortar_01_F. Defaults to a mix of HMG and mortar classnames.
Prevents specific unit group classnames from being used by this CQB module. Enter group classnames separated by commas, no spaces, no quotes — e.g. OPF_G_Inf_AT_F,OPF_G_Inf_AA_F.

SQF code executed each time a CQB unit spawns. _this = [unit, profileID, side, faction]. Runs server-side in a scheduled thread. To affect all clients use remoteExec or publicVariable. hint and player commands will have no effect. Example: _this params ["_unit"]; ["fnc_mySetup", _unit] remoteExec ["BIS_fnc_call"];
Yes: the SQF hook runs only on the first spawn of each unit — useful for one-time setup like adding event handlers. No: runs every time the unit re-spawns.
